content:
# Session 23 (iter-023) — review

## Metadata
- Stage: prover (`mathlib-build`). Lane = **1.3 foundation** (`H_locallyFree`): S1 `External.adjunction` + S2 `ext_tensor_halfexact`.
- **Sorry: 4 → 4** (flat, EXPECTED — infra iter; directive forbade touching the 4 deep §1 sorries).
- **Axioms: 13 → 13 `External.*` (NO new axiom).** Plan authorized +1 (`External.adjunction` as axiom); prover **proved it instead** → count stays flat. Build exit 0 (8475 jobs, 24s). `lean_verify` on the file = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (no `sorryAx` in new decls).
- 82 events: 19 edits, 18 diagnostics, 15 lemma searches, 0 standalone goal-checks, 1 final build. 13 transient errors (all rewrite-pattern / instance-synth / unknown-constant, all self-corrected).

## Targets & attempts (from attempts_raw.jsonl)

### `External.adjunction` (L606) — SOLVED, axiom→proof upgrade
- Planner authorized as EGA O_I 4.4.3.1 axiom. Prover verified `Scheme.Modules.pushforward` exists **generally** (not just open immersions) with `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction j : pullback j ⊣ pushforward j`, so the **degree-0 hom-set form consumed by (1.3)** — `(I ⟶ j_* G) ≃ (j^* I ⟶ G)` — is the literal Mathlib adjunction hom-equiv.
- Realized as `noncomputable def External.adjunction … := ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction j).homEquiv I G).symm`.
- Gotcha: first written as `theorem` → "type is not a proposition" (the iso is data); fixed to `noncomputable def`.
- Strictly better than the authorized axiom: axiom-clean, keeps axiom count at 13, and is the literal goal of mathlib-build mode.

### `ext_tensor_halfexact` (L672) — SOLVED, CONDITIONAL
- Found `CategoryTheory.Abelian.Ext.covariant_sequence_exact₂` (covariant Ext LES, SES in 2nd variable) in `Mathlib/.../DerivedCategory/Ext/ExactSequences.lean`.
- Stated in exactness-at-the-middle (membership) form; flatness input **isolated** as hypothesis `hSE : (sc.map (tensorBaseChangeFunctor f F)).ShortExact` (= the to-be-anchored `External.flat_tensor_exact` conclusion). Per planner, S2(a) stalkwise flat-tensor exactness was NOT ground out.
- 3-line body: `intro x₂ hx₂; exact Ext.covariant_sequence_exact₂ I hSE x₂ hx₂`. Terms `Ext I (tensorBC f F sc.Xᵢ) q` are defeq to `(sc.map …).Xᵢ`.
- Pattern: `HasDerivedCategory.standard` + `hasExt_of_hasDerivedCategory` reused via `letI`/`haveI` **inside the conclusion type AND the body** (mirrors `extGroup`).

### `tensorLeft_preservesZeroMorphisms` (L637) / `tensorBaseChangeFunctor_preservesZeroMorphisms` (L654) — SOLVED
- `tensorLeft F` is hand-built (`PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorHom` + sheafification); `X.Modules` has no `MonoidalCategory`, so no inferable `PreservesZeroMorphisms`.
- `map_zero` proven by hand: `(0).val = 0` (rfl); `tensorHom (𝟙 F.val) 0 = 0` via `ext1 Y; rw tensorHom_app; exact MonoidalPreadditive.tensor_zero _`; then `Functor.map_zero` (sheafification HAS `PreservesZeroMorphisms`).
- Intermediate dead-ends recorded: bare `simp` left `tensorHom (…app Y) 0 = 0`; `PresheafOfModules.Hom.zero_app` is an unknown constant. Final form uses explicit `MonoidalPreadditive.tensor_zero`.
- Base-change instance = `unfold tensorBaseChangeFunctor; infer_instance`.

### `tensorLeft_additive` — ATTEMPTED, BLOCKED, REVERTED
- `map_add` half via `MonoidalPreadditive.tensor_add` works, but the final `Functor.map_add` needs `(PresheafOfModules.sheafification _).Additive`, which is **NOT** a synthesizable instance (`failed to synthesize … .Additive`; no loogle hit). Reverted to keep the file clean (decl is optional, not used by `ext_tensor_halfexact`).
- **Dead-end warning:** do not retry until sheafification additivity (left adjoint ⇒ preserves biproducts ⇒ additive) is supplied.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Scheme-module pushforward adjunction is general** — `Scheme.Modules.pushforward`/`pullbackPushforwardAdjunction` exist for any `j : Y ⟶ X`; the degree-0 EGA adjunction needs no axiom.
- **Hand-built functor additivity gap:** `tensorLeft` gets `PreservesZeroMorphisms` cheaply but `Additive` is blocked on absent `sheafification.Additive`.
- **Ext-LES coordinates:** `Ext.covariant_sequence_exact₂` (membership form) is cleaner than `ShortComplex.mk … .Exact` (which embeds the zero-composition obligation).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard_Basic.tex`, `thm:ega_adjunction`: added `\mathlibok` (Lean decl = `((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction j).homEquiv I G).symm`, direct Mathlib alias, no new obligation); **stripped stale `% NOTE:`** ("not yet scaffolded / needs fibre products") which is now false; added `% NOTE:` recording that the realized degree-0 hom-set form differs from the still-absent fibre-product sheaf-Hom prose, flagging the planner to reconcile.
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard_Basic.tex`, `lem:ext_tensor_halfexact`: added `% NOTE:` recording the CONDITIONAL form (hypothesis `hSE`, S-flatness not consumed directly; `\leanok` reflects the conditional decl compiling, not the unconditional prose) + the deferred `External.flat_tensor_exact` anchor needed to make it unconditional. **Did not touch `\leanok`** (sync-set, legit — compiles sorry-free).

## Doctor / sync
- `sync_leanok`: iter=23, sha 3e803fb, added=3, removed=0 — marked `thm:ega_adjunction` + `lem:ext_tensor_halfexact` (+ likely a third dep). Accepted; manual `\mathlibok`/`% NOTE:` overrides documented above.
- Doctor: 13 `External.*` re-flagged (intentional EGA/OB/Stacks boundary; NO new axiom this iter — `External.adjunction` proved, not assumed). No orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`.
- `dag-query`: gaps=0; **unmatched=2** (`tensorLeft_preservesZeroMorphisms`, `tensorBaseChangeFunctor_preservesZeroMorphisms`) → coverage debt in recommendations.md.

## Convergence verdict
Genuine planned foundation progress on the 1.3 multi-iter build, NOT churn. Both planned bricks landed; S1 was *upgraded* axiom→proof (best-case). Sorry-flatness is the expected infra-iter signature; zero new axioms. The 1.3 strand is correctly in its build phase (not anchor-and-assemble, since its core IS the §1 argument). Next: anchor `External.flat_tensor_exact` to discharge `hSE`, then the A-module-on-Ext / reduction / `T(k(s))=0` / free-conclusion chain.
